echo.name: Echo
lines: Phew... I've confirmed the mic is on, so please stop calling me.
It's depressing to realize I'm the only sane person in this terminal every single day.
Stop wasting time listening to my broadcast and watch your step. Don't get blood on my floors.

friendly.greeting: Well, if it isn't our 'celebrity' Necromancer. I'll broadcast from your perspective as a special favor, so why don't you cause an even bigger scene?
friendly.farewell: Don't die on me. Thanks to you, the ratings... I mean, my boredom is actually fading a bit.

normal.greeting: Attention. Once again, someone is making a scene and wasting the terminal's precious budget. Yes, I'm talking about you.
normal.farewell: Ending broadcast. If you're done, turn off the mic and disappear. I barely have enough time for a smoke break as it is.

hostile.greeting: Look at that Resistance lackey crawling this way. Don't knock on the booth door with those filthy hands; you'll smudge the camera lens.
hostile.farewell: I'll record your screams and use them as a lullaby later. It'll be a masterpiece.

echo.deathLine: This tedious broadcasting... is finally over... Ha...
echo.description: A female announcer holed up in the terminal's broadcast room, spitting out all sorts of venomous remarks. In reality, she might be enjoying this chaos more than anyone.

caron.name: Charon
caron.deathLine: Ah... Ahhh... my child... ending up like this without even reaching revenge...
caron.description: Emerging from a tear in twisted space-time, Charon stares at you while exuding an abyssal murderous intent.

caron_alive.name: Charon
lines: This is a place where the Reaper's eyes cannot reach.
I shall hide in your shadow and await the moment.
Would you like to reorganize your forces?

friendly.greeting: Welcome, my Lord. The dimensional gate is always open.
friendly.farewell: I shall watch your advance from the shadows.

normal.greeting: The Reaper's aura is close. State your business quickly.

hostile.greeting: Are you going to turn me into a butcher once again?

caron_alive.deathLine: My revenge... has not even begun yet...
caron_alive.description: A former underground administrator who betrayed the Reaper and hid in the protagonist's shadow. He is gentle yet harbors a cold desire for revenge.

caron_dead.name: Guide of the Void
lines: ...Sss...sssk...
......(Hollow eyes turn toward you)......
...Comm...and... me...

normal.farewell: ......(Only a bizarre breathing sound is heard)......

caron_dead.description: A bizarre familiar crafted from the usurped essence of Charon. Its self-awareness has vanished, and it manipulates void space only in response to your mana.

adrian.name: Adrian, the Terrified Guide
lines: Please... a gunfight in the lobby... according to Article 4, Section 2 of the rulebook...
The space under the information desk is already full! It's too cramped for even me to hide alone!

friendly.greeting: Ah... are you looking for a refuge too? I'm sorry, but all emergency exits have already been sealed...
friendly.farewell: I hope... you stay safe, at least until the smoke outside clears.

normal.greeting: Checking in... that doesn't mean anything anymore, does it? There's a corpse behind that pillar... Ugh...
normal.farewell: Be careful. I heard Resistance members are coming down from the upper floors.

hostile.greeting: Are you one of those rioters too? There's nothing left to break, so why?!
hostile.farewell: The 'record of your visit'... will surely remain in the registers of hell!

adrian.deathLine: Leaving work... is out of the question today... I didn't even... finish the settlement...
adrian.description: He gives off an air of reliability, as if he could resolve even the most complicated reservation situations calmly.

flint.name: Flint the Assault Leader
lines: I can smell those canvases burning from here. How satisfying.
The real show begins when the hostages start pouring out screaming. Get ready.
If we cut the power to this sector, even the people at the bottom will have a bright night for once.

friendly.greeting: You're here? Things have gotten easier thanks to you joining. I'll watch your back.
friendly.farewell: Go on ahead. I need to stay and see this damn machine turn completely to ash.

normal.greeting: Don't loiter around unless you want a stray bullet to put a hole in you.
normal.farewell: Watch out for yourself if you want to live. I don't have the luxury of lookin' after dead weight.

hostile.greeting: Still haven't gotten lost? Not being able to finish you off during that ambush will be the regret of your life.
hostile.farewell: You can't leave this floor even if you run. Next time, I'll drive a piece of flint into your heart.

flint.deathLine: The flame... has not... gone out yet...
flint.description: The assault leader of the Resistance. Possesses a rough and explosive personality, just like his name.

julian.name: Julian, the Cynical Bartender
lines: What a terrible marriage. Fine whiskey and the smell of blood.
The incompetence of the security team isn't even enough to serve as a side dish.
If I'd known the back of the bar would be this unsafe, I would have resigned long ago.

friendly.greeting: Welcome. You're the only person in this mess who seems capable of a proper conversation.
friendly.farewell: Please be careful. If something happens to you, there will be nothing but ignorant rioters left on this floor.

normal.greeting: Would you like to order? Ah, as you can see, I'm in a position where I have to hold a pistol instead of a shaker.
normal.farewell: If you're done with your business, please move along. I don't even have the luxury of clearing away the broken glass.

hostile.greeting: Service isn't provided to rude guests. Shall I prepare a special 'poisoned drink' just for you?
hostile.farewell: Get lost. Mingle with your own kind; it's not my taste.

julian.deathLine: I wanted to... pour... the last glass... myself...
julian.description: A sophisticated bartender who was in charge of the VIP floor bar.

oliver.name: Oliver, the Dying Waiter

friendly.greeting: Are you... a comrade of theirs too? Go on... and burn that fake paradise to the ground.
friendly.farewell: Don't worry about me... I won't die until I've seen this spectacle to the end.

normal.greeting: It doesn't matter who it is. Tonight, this VIP floor... will be a grave for us all.
normal.farewell: Go and tell them. Dinner is ready... and now it's time for judgment.

hostile.greeting: Is there still a dog left siding with those upper-class bastards? I'll use my last bit of strength to end your breath!
hostile.farewell: Kill me... even if I die, the flames of revolution... will swallow you all!

oliver.deathLine: Finally... clocking out... to the lobby... engulfed in flames...
oliver.description: A waiter who spent his life being despised while working in the kitchen. Even while fatally injured, he views the Resistance's attack as divine salvation and pours out deep-seated resentment toward the upper class.

kael.name: Kael the Cold
lines: You can't pull the trigger if you're swayed by emotion.
Flint is right. Nothing changes unless you break it.
I'll deal with anyone who makes Vesper cry in my own way.

friendly.greeting: So you're the one Flint was talking about. You look pretty strong.
friendly.farewell: Watch your step. The security guards on the VIP floor are persistent.

hostile.greeting: I'm sorry, but it's nothing personal. You're just a target to be eliminated.
hostile.farewell: I'll aim more precisely next time.

kael.description: A young boy from the labor camps. He considers protecting Vesper his sole mission in life.

vesper.name: Vesper the Naive
lines: Those jewels the ladies upstairs wear wouldn't even be worth ten bowls of rice back in our village.
Kael! Don't go too far! Don't step out of my crossbow's range!
This thing called revolution... makes me a lot hungrier than I thought.

friendly.greeting: Hi! Do you have anything to eat? I mean real food, not adrenaline!
friendly.farewell: If I see you next time, give me something delicious! Consider it a reward for me letting you live!

hostile.greeting: Whoa, you really smell like a VIP! Want to see how much this crossbow bolt hurts?
hostile.farewell: Bleh! You missed! Next time, I'm really gonna put a hole in you!

vesper.description: She masks her fear of war with a playful attitude, but her hatred for the upper class is as deep as Kael's.

baron_valter.name: Baron Valter, the Arrogant Ruler
lines: The dust is acting up. What on earth are the cleaners doing?
There's gunpowder mixed into this wine. I'd like to ask the manager how he intends to apologize for this insolence.
The Resistance? Did you think I'd be startled by the sound of starving dogs barking?

friendly.greeting: At least a hound that understands words has arrived. Clear the path ahead of me. I'll make sure the reward is worth your while.
friendly.farewell: Begone. The stench of your sweat is ruining my vintage aroma.

normal.greeting: Who are you? A hired mercenary? Or an uninvited guest who lost their way?
normal.farewell: If your business is concluded, disappear. My patience is thinner than the wine left in this glass.

hostile.greeting: Did you truly believe you could step into this sector and leave unscathed? The arrogance of lower lifeforms.
hostile.farewell: Your screams don't even have any artistic value. Utterly unpleasant.

baron_valter.deathLine: To think that my... noble blood... would mix with the dust on the floor... I will never... forgive this...
baron_valter.description: A titan of industry who owns shares in the city's power grid. He views even the Resistance's attack as a minor discourtesy interrupting his rest, and personally executes intruders with his custom gold-plated revolver.
